modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need to modify or recruit CSA or NFE job descriptions.

full_description_text: 
El usuario está intentando modificar o reclutar descripciones de trabajo para posiciones de Servicio Civil (CSA) o Exentos de No Facultad (NFE). Sin embargo, hay un problema con el proceso actual que impide que se realicen estos cambios. Se requiere asistencia para resolver esta situación en el entorno de gestión de posiciones.
